did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Correspondence concerning appointments, departmental reports, financial matters, and research projects.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Director of the Cornell Agricultural Experiment Station; Director of Research.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence concerning appointments, departmental reports, financial matters, and research projects.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Carl E. F. Guterman papers, #21-12-721. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
